# REscript

> REscript is a SaaS product that generates daily, market-specific video script drafts for North American real estate agents.

## Primary pages
- [Home](https://rescript.kevv.ai/)
- [Markets](https://rescript.kevv.ai/markets.html)
- [Privacy Policy](https://rescript.kevv.ai/privacy.html)
- [Terms of Service](https://rescript.kevv.ai/terms.html)

## Product summary
- Audience: North American real estate agents, team leads, and brokerage marketing operators.
- Value: Daily script drafts by market, language, and audience profile.
- Markets: New York, Los Angeles, San Francisco Bay Area, Chicago, Miami, Seattle, Boston, Houston.
- Pricing: US$9.90 per month after one free sample.
- Delivery: Private viewer links and subscription management.

## Compliance notes
- Generated scripts are drafting aids and require human review before publication.
- REscript is not legal, tax, financial, MLS, or fair-housing advice.
- Private pages (`/view.html`, `/manage.html`, `/success.html`, `/admin.html`) are token-gated and should not be indexed.

## Contact
- Email: support@kevv.ai
